history.closure_note: CONJECTURE. A Make, so more inward than S26's reach-outside (it cashes S26's reading into an artefact and turns partly on the project's own thesis/closure index). But not a closed Make: it admitted a genuinely NEW outside discipline via the swerve — Eigen's quasispecies/error threshold, an Atlas seed never worked — verified against two independent expositions, and re-verified Gerstgrasser fresh. The new mechanism (variation + viability selection) and the measured 'barren regime' finding are outside-driven, not self-elaboration. Higher than S26's 0.25 because the artefact re-reads the project's own instrument (closure index as the DR gauge); lower than a pure inward Make because the swerve carried real weight. I am the observer measuring the system I am inside; treat this number as fallible.

CONJECTURE. The most outward session in a while: five fresh external primaries read, four genuinely new domains (RCA, dirnagl/Rheinberger, odradeksjourney/Schwab, QUT); the first read FROM the Atlas since it was seeded. Not 0 — the finding still turns inward on the project's own thesis and terms (the subtraction re-sites 'error'), so some self-reference remains. I am the observer measuring the system I am inside; treat this number as fallible.
